outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Who will blink first as the Iran war standoff hits the world economy?
outlets.summary: Analysis of the economic standoff between US blockade and Iran's Hormuz strategy. Both sides waiting for the other to make concessions as global economy suffers.

outlets.name: The Intercept
outlets.headline: Pentagon Erases Wounded U.S. Troops From Iran War Casualty List
outlets.summary: Pentagon quietly removed 15 wounded from official casualty count. Internal DCAS data shows 23% higher figures than CENTCOM public claims.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran escalates Hormuz 'tit-for-tat,' seizes ship tied to billionaire close to Trump, Macron
outlets.summary: IRGC Navy seized MSC Francesca and Greek-owned Epaminondas in Strait of Hormuz, escalating maritime confrontation with Western shipping.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Bessent sanctions 14 entities in 'Economic Fury' campaign against Iran weapons procurement
outlets.summary: Treasury's 'Economic Fury' campaign targets Iran, Turkey, and UAE entities aiding Iranian weapons procurement.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Lebanon truce extended; Trump says time not on Tehran's side
outlets.summary: Live coverage of Day 56: Lebanon ceasefire extended, Trump's 'shoot and kill' order, Brent crosses $105, Pentagon NATO memo.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil killed in Israeli strike during ceasefire
outlets.summary: Al-Akhbar reporter Amal Khalil killed in Israeli airstrike in southern Lebanon. CPJ calls for urgent international investigation.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Pentagon memo floats booting Spain from NATO over refusal to join Iran war
outlets.summary: Internal Pentagon email outlines options to punish NATO allies including suspending Spain and reviewing UK Falklands position.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Hezbollah fires rockets at northern Israel as White House ceasefire talks resume
outlets.summary: Hezbollah fired rockets at Shtula during ceasefire. IDF destroyed launcher 'within minutes.' Two soldiers indicted for Iran espionage.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pentagon 'covers up' US casualties of war against Iran
outlets.summary: Iranian state media highlights Intercept report on Pentagon removing 15 wounded from casualty count. Frames as evidence of US deception about war costs.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran's leadership rejects 'fracture' claims — 'we are all Iranian and revolutionary'
outlets.summary: Coordinated unity statement from Pezeshkian, Araghchi, Qalibaf rejects Trump's claims of leadership rift. 'We are all Iranian and revolutionary.'
